description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical freestanding punching bag with a vibrant red body and a black base. The main body features a bold, stylized logo at the top and the phrase 'LIFE IS A FIGHT' printed vertically down the center. The base is wide, circular, and black, providing stability, and is ringed with the repeated phrase 'LIFE IS A FIGHT' in red. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather or vinyl, likely filled with foam and air for impact absorption. The object is designed for striking and training, commonly found in gyms, garages, or urban recreational areas. There are no visible handles, chains, or mounting hardware, indicating it is meant to stand freely on the ground.
description: A tall, red freestanding punching bag with a black base and bold logo, featuring the phrase 'LIFE IS A FIGHT' on both the body and base. The surface is smooth and durable, designed for striking in training environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo and vertical 'LIFE IS A FIGHT' text clearly on the red body, with the black base and red text ring visible.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible logo or vertical text, only the red cylindrical body and black base with red text ring.
description_view_2: Another front view similar to view 0, with the logo and vertical text visible, showing the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view, showing only the red body and black base, with no visible logo or vertical text.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized logo is visible at the top front of the bag, above the vertical text.
